title: trachelanthus korolkowii
intro: Trachelanthus korolkowii, also known as the Korean angelica, is a type of plant that belongs to the buttercup family and is native to Korea and parts of Russia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Trachelanthus korolkowii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Trachelanthus korolkowii include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
